settings.a: Free UK delivery on orders over £35. Under that, delivery is shown in full at checkout — never a surprise.
A 30-day money-back guarantee, plus your legal 14-day cancellation right. For hygiene reasons, used lick mats, snuffle mats and grooming items can't be returned once opened unless faulty.

settings.q: Do these actually help anxious dogs?
settings.a: They're comfort and enrichment tools that give dogs a calming, nose-led job to focus on — not medical treatments.
